steps.t: Fastred has told you to meet him in the prison of Snowbourn, located near the Mead Hall. You should speak with Fastred, as he instructed.
Gísling's cell is inside the prison of Snowbourn. You should open Gísling's cell and return to him his freedom now that Sigeric has been exposed as a …
Gísling can be found in eastern Snowbourn to the north of the east gate. You should speak with Gísling now that he has been freed from his imprisonmen…
